code:
import io
import string

let content = io.read_to_end()
let lines = string.split(content, "\n")
mut found = false
mut result = ""
for line in lines
  if not found
    let trimmed = string.trim(line)
    if not string.is_empty(trimmed)
      result = trimmed
      found = true
    end
  end
end
if found
  print(result)
else
  print("(none)")
end
